features: FOOD GRADE STAINLESS STEEL 18/8 CONSTRUCTION: Our kitchen strainer is made of first class Stainless Steel 18/8 that is BPA free, LFGB Approved, Lead and Cadmium free. It is rust free and will never affect the taste of your food! Our heavy duty steel will never deform or bend as it’s 20% thicker than other colanders.

RIVETED AND HEAT RESISTANT HANDLES: Our premium handles are riveted to the bowl so it will never come off! The super soft, non-slip elevated handles provide a firm comfortable grip. The rubber construction allows you to handle even the hottest pasta or noodles without a hassle.

LARGE CAPACITY TO STRAIN ANYTHING YOU NEED: If you were searching for a spacious strainer that allows you to strain pasta, noodles, orzo, vegetables and fruits for your large family at one go, our colander is what you need. The 5-quart capacity makes this attractive even for small restaurants and food trucks.

QUICK DRAINING MICRO-PERFORATIONS: Tiny, closely spaced holes mean your food drains fast without having to tilt the bowl. The sturdy solid ring base keeps the colander from tipping over so that you can fill it up without fear of dumping your food.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: We are so confident in the quality of our colander that we offer you a lifetime guarantee. Reach out to us if there’s ever anything you need; we are dedicated to your satisfaction.
description: Is your current food strainer rusty and hard to clean? Our fantastic strainer is made of 100% stainless steel for easy cleaning. We used only the highest quality stainless steel available to ensure hygienic water draining. Simply set it in the dishwasher for a fast, hygienic, and perfect cleaning. Even without a dishwasher, this colander is so easy to clean—just put it under running water and it will be as good a new, ready to be used again. This colander won’t rust, bend, or break! Are your current food strainer's handles come off easliy? Are the handles hot when you handle the hot pasta or noodles? We studied a lot. We improved our colander handles with rivet and plastic. Our premium handles are riveted to the bowl so it will never come off! You'll never have to worry about handles coming off or a freak accident due to excessive weight contents in the colander while holding it. The super soft, non-slip elevated handles provide a firm comfortable grip. The rubber construction allows you to handle even the hottest pasta or noodles without a hassle.
